prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年吉林省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约295名、237名、420名、268名、1252名。2021–2024年位次在237–420之间窄幅波动，2025年骤升至1252名，主要受招生计划从3人扩至5人影响，基准位次约1252名；该校在吉林省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021–2023年各3人，2024年3人，2025年增至5人；2026年计划维持5人，与2025年持平，扩招效应已充分释放，2026年无额外扩招压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学医学院为985、211、双一流高校，依托浙江大学（软科主榜第3名）办学，属于国内顶尖医学院校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内浙江大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风及校园安全事件，但主要指向校本部，对医学院直接影响有限；抖音热度排名第14位（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度仍处高位；未见明显投档断档记录；临床医学（A）、口腔医学（A+）、药学（A+）、基础医学（A-）等均为A类学科，与招生专业（临床医学5+3一体化、医学试验班类、药学类）高度对应，学科实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学专业热度持续高热推荐（2024年），药学类热度平稳；吉林省2026年高考总人数约110868人，较2025年（111492人）微降，物理类估算约80047人（较2025年80421人略减），竞争压力略有缓和；浙江大学医学院位于浙江省杭州市，属经济发达地区，对吉林省考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在吉林省招生计划较小（5人），属于外省优质高校的稀缺名额，竞争集中度高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次因扩招大幅后移的基数效应、2026年招生计划持平、考生总数微降、医学类专业热度持续高位及学校顶尖层次等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年1252名基础上小幅回调（竞争略缓和），预测最低位次约1227名，区间1080–1374名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班，学制8年，临床医学）
- 医学试验班类（临床医学、口腔医学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（学制5年，5+3一体化培养）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（学制5年）
- 药学类（药学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1080–1374名内，建议以二档临床医学（5+3一体化）为主攻方向，一档医学试验班（竺可桢班/临床口腔类）作为冲刺，三档预防医学和药学类作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（1080名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jilin Province Science (Physics Category) were approximately 295, 237, 420, 268, and 1252 respectively. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 237 and 420 from 2021 to 2024, but surged to 1252 in 2025, mainly due to the expansion of enrollment from 3 to 5 students, with a baseline ranking of about 1252. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province Science (Physics Category) was 3 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 3 in 2024, and increased to 5 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 5, unchanged from 2025, indicating that the expansion effect has been fully realized, with no additional expansion pressure in 2026.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University School of Medicine is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with Zhejiang University (ranked 3rd on the Soft Science Main Ranking). It is a top-tier medical school in China, strongly attracting high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents, but these mainly refer to the main campus and have limited direct impact on the School of Medicine. It ranks 14th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, indicating sustained high application attention. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. Clinical Medicine (A), Stomatology (A+), Pharmacy (A+), and Basic Medicine (A-) are all A-level disciplines, closely matching the enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine 5+3 Integrated Program, Medical Experimental Class, Pharmacy Class), with nationally top-tier academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine and Stomatology majors continue to be highly recommended (2024), while Pharmacy class popularity is stable. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province college entrance examination is approximately 110,868, slightly down from 111,492 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 80,047 (slightly less than 80,421 in 2025), indicating slightly eased competition pressure. Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, an economically developed region, which strongly attracts candidates from Jilin Province. The enrollment plan in Jilin Province is small (5 students), representing scarce slots from a high-quality out-of-province university, leading to high competition concentration.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking drop in 2025 due to enrollment expansion, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, a slight decrease in total candidates, sustained high popularity of medical majors, and the top-tier level of the school, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly recover from the 2025 ranking of 1252 (competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1227, with a range of 1080 to 1374.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Ba De Nian Medical Class, 8-year program, Clinical Medicine)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year program, 5+3 integrated training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Preventive Medicine (5-year program)
- Pharmacy Class (Pharmacy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1080 to 1374, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) as the main target, with Tier 1 Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Class/Clinical Stomatology) as a reach, and Tier 3 Preventive Medicine and Pharmacy Class as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 1080), prioritize aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
